# NEON DEFENDER — GitHub Copilot Workspace Instructions

_Last updated: 2026-04-02_

---

## Project

NEON DEFENDER is a classic arcade-style space shooter inspired by Galaxian and Galaga.
Stack: React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS. Entry: `src/main.tsx`. State: in-memory TypeScript objects.

## Before Any Task

- Read `Roadmap.md` to understand current phase, target user, and scope boundaries.
- Do not implement Phase 3 or later features (see `Roadmap.md`) without explicit user instruction.

## Project-Specific Code Rules

- All code, comments, and UI text must be in English.
- Do not add new dependencies without explicit user approval.
- Optimize for clarity and minimalism; avoid unnecessary abstractions.
